notes: Recorded product staff DOA critique. Main risks: owner-paid token model may kill supply, map may add friction without visible value, external category is unclear, SillyTavern clone risk, API Key trust gap, memory payoff is invisible. Marked geosocial/game pivot suggestions as conflicting with current hard constraints unless owner explicitly changes strategy.
